nodes.context: Japanese underworld organization formed by Yoshio Kodama in 1964, based in Kantō region.
Kansai-based gang led by Kazuo Taoka, refused to join Kodama's envisioned Japan-wide gangster society.

edges.evidence_quote: Kodama had originally envisioned a Japan-wide gangster society, but in 1963 Kazuo Taoka and his Kansai -based Yamaguchi-gumi gang refused to join, leaving Kodama with a Kantō-heavy organization.
edges.context: Yamaguchi-gumi refused to join the Kantō-kai, indicating a lack of cooperation.
